race.comment: Lots of win chances. ODESSA (5) was safely held fresh but that was in a far richer race when fourth at Cranbourne. Has upside and this suits. Expected to improve sharply. ICY POLE (6) is a lightly raced mare resuming and is well placed this grade. Was runner-up at Sandown when last resuming and trip suits fresh. One of the main chances. ANTISOCIAL (2) found winning form at third run back last time when leading throughout to score here. Has good speed and is sure to take catching again. MR BUTT'S BOATS (4) was resuming from a year off and gave a sight but condition gave out late and faded to sixth. Will strip much fitter. I'MATEEZ (1) resumes after a recent trial win. Has plenty of ability and capable of a bold return.
